name: Cameron Esposito
bio: Cameron Esposito is an American stand-up comedian, actress, and podcaster whose work focuses on LGBTQ life, feminism, and social justice. They co-created and starred in the series Take My Wife, released the special Rape Jokes as a benefit for the anti-sexual-violence group RAINN, and host the interview podcast Queery.

timeline.ev: Makes TV debut on The Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson
Releases the special Marriage Material and co-creates Take My Wife
Releases the benefit special Rape Jokes for RAINN
Releases Four Pills, a directorial debut, on Dropout

accolades: Co-creator and star of Take My Wife
Benefit special Rape Jokes (2018) supporting RAINN

bits.t: What Getting Your Period Is Really Like
